Its been upgraded. We got one 3 nights ago. We were bored and everything else in North wing was dead so we killed Telk, got two good drops too, this and a True Mithral BP.

Its now 20 AC, 7 Str, 7 Sta, 100 hp, 50 mana wt 0 all/all

dont be an @$$!
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 30 2001 at 10:31 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) oh and if anyone needs cured silk on vallon zek send me a tell
#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 30 2001 at 10:29 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) f you love monks so much why dont you marry errrr be one?........... I actually like monks they do a nice bit of dmg but i would prefer a Shadow Knight, Paladin over a monk any day and that for 2 reasons.......... AC/Taunt..... monks are a damage dealing class they have very little ac and they cant taunt. example I am Healing the heck of of a monk because hes aggroed like a cop on a doughnut when the mob gets mad at me for healing/ds/regen if there is no tank in the group i would probally die because the monk cant taunt to make extra aggro on he/she then the lack of ac comes in and the whole group is whiped out when i the healer go oom and then the monk goes down.... thus the whole group follows. I do not have anything against monks i would prefer a hybrid/warrior over you guys heh......
RE: Ah,,,,
QuoteReply
# May 09 2001 at 9:39 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591749984472
Scholar
16 posts
Based on your theory there, you obviously have been shamed by a Ranger in 1 on 1 combat vs one...

Seriously, there's no place for hatemongering, I can understand this other person saying he hates monks although I don't aggree that 'hate' is the right word... the monks I've seen post here have shown a general trend towards being greedy, bigmouthed, abusive, and more.

I know there are some exceptions, I personally know some people who play monks very well... I fear that nicer people / players have been scared away from posting here because of complainers and hatemongers, and that's a sad thing to see.
▲ Page top
